raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint against American Express regarding a denied dispute for a {$7300.00} charge made through the Amex Hotel Collection. 

The booking was for XXXX XXXX XXXX for a family trip in late XXXX through early XX/XX/year>. The experience was completely unacceptable due to broken resort amenities ( non-working pool slide, broken ice machines, no poolside service ), unsafe conditions ( restaurant closed due to chemical fumes ), and verbal and discriminatory harassment from hotel staff toward both my wife and elderly mother-in-law, the cardholder. 

While on-site, the hotels XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX directly with an Amex Travel agent in front of me and confirmed a refund would be issued. Despite this, the hotel later refused to follow through, and Amex denied the dispute without further investigation. 

I provided Amex : Written statements, Travel agent chat logs ( Ref : XXXX ), Photos of broken facilities, Witness declarations regarding the verbal refund commitment. 

Amex failed to advocate for the cardholder or hold the travel partner accountable, even though this was a booking through Amex Travels Hotel Collection, which claims to vet high-quality properties.

I am requesting the CFPB investigate whether : Amex violated dispute resolution guidelines, The Amex Hotel Collection falsely advertised the hotel experience, Amex failed to protect a vulnerable consumer ( elderly traveler ).

I request that the full refund of {$7300.00} be reinstated to the cardholder and that Amex be required to provide accountability for its partner vendors.
